creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeBSD works beautifully on the Sun Blade X8420.  It's a machine with
four dual core Opterons and 32 Gig of ram, and it's blisteringly fast.  Tell
the world!

How-To-Repeat: 	Install FreeBSD
